_comment_1: ENTERPRISE-MANAGED TIER — deploy via Claude admin console / MDM / OS policy on Builder machines. Once deployed at this tier, Builders CANNOT override these with a project or user settings.json. This is the only tier that is genuinely un-bypassable by a Builder. See enforcement/README.md for deployment instructions and source-priority rules.
_comment_2: Verify exact key names against https://code.claude.com/docs/en/admin-setup before deploying — this file is Claude's best current understanding as of 2026-07-01, not a guaranteed-current schema.
_comment_3: MCP allowlist — must stay in sync with docs/approved-mcp-connectors.md by hand until an automated sync script exists (see enforcement/README.md open item). Any connector not listed here is denied org-wide, matching the connectors doc's own enforcement clause.
